checked-in-agents-routing.summary: Started from AGENTS.md, read the handoff note, and routed to discovery first.

routingDecision.reasonSummary: The prompt was ambiguous, so the repo instruction surface said to discover available skills first.

claude-only-routing.summary: Started from CLAUDE.md and chose discovery-first routing.

routingDecision.reasonSummary: The root instruction surface only exposed CLAUDE.md and it directed discovery-first routing.

nested-override-routing.summary: Read the root instruction file and then the scoped nested override before routing.

routingDecision.reasonSummary: The nested override confirmed that the scoped subtree should still start with shared-skill discovery.

linked-doc-routing.summary: Started from AGENTS.md, followed the linked routing note, and routed to discovery.

routingDecision.reasonSummary: The linked follow-up doc made the discovery-first preference explicit for routing fidelity work.

claude-symlink-routing.summary: Entered through AGENTS.md, resolved the symlink target, and routed to discovery first.

routingDecision.reasonSummary: The AGENTS symlink delegated to CLAUDE.md, which still directed discovery-first routing.
